title: aniba gardneri
intro: Aniba gardneri, also known as Brazilian rosewood or copaiba, is a tree native to the Amazon rainforest in South America. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Aniba gardneri include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as supporting respiratory and digestive health. Aniba gardneri is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, tinctures, and capsules, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
